intent_head: Who has the next upcoming birthday? If there is a tie on the date, include every matching person. Answer with exact names only, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Performed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read 99_system policy and nested entities rulebooks before task work, and used cast records as authoritative for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Using today's date from context (2026-03-30) and birthday entries discovered in 10_entities/cast, the earliest upcoming month-day is 05-21; the canonical cast file for that entry gives the exact name Tobias Kern. No same-date tie appeared in the birthday search results.
